behavior_summary: This script implements the 'U8P_MAGHELM::look' (examine) handler for a magic helm item. When the player examines the item, the handler emits a short descriptive bark 'magic helm' and then suspends/ends the process.
The item is flagged in metadata as armour with armourClass = 5 (gameplay property).
There are no dialogue branches, menus, global flag reads/writes, or external calls recorded — the behavior is minimal and deterministic.
A terminal 'suspend' node follows the bark; this likely ends or yields the U8P_MAGHELM::look process after presenting the description.
notable_control_flow: Single linear execution path: emit a bark ('magic helm') then suspend/terminate the process.
No conditional branches, menus, or external interactions — deterministic on each examine event.
Entry is event-driven: triggered by the engine's 'U8P_MAGHELM::look' / examine action for the item.
open_questions: Exact engine semantics of the observed 'suspend' node (immediately terminate vs. yield to scheduler) — inferred but not explicit.
Two low-confidence 'Unknown' nodes are present in the raw; their exact original constructs are unclear but do not appear to affect outward behavior.
Whether additional item metadata beyond armourClass = 5 (e.g., enchantments, durability) is present elsewhere and used by other systems.

main_function.name: U8P_MAGHELM::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown when the player examines the magic helm. The function emits the bark 'magic helm' and then ends/suspends.
entry_conditions: Player performs a 'U8P_MAGHELM::look' / examine action on the magic helm item (engine invokes the processType 0x0208 U8P_MAGHELM::look handler).

function_map.name: U8P_MAGHELM::look
function_map.role: Examine/U8P_MAGHELM::look handler for the magic helm item — emits a single short description/bark and terminates.
